summary: Frontend testing completed for School landing page. All features working correctly - courses fetched from API, login redirects to LMS, apply wizard with 3 steps functional.
passed_tests: Home page loads with GITB branding (logo in header)
Navigation items present: Home, Schools, Why GITB, Partner, Resources, Policies
Login button present in header
Apply Now button present in header
Login button redirects to LMS login page (https://gitb-school.preview.emergentagent.com/login)
Hero section shows 'Europe's Best Innovative Online School' with GITB branding
Trending Nano-Diploma programs section displays 5 course cards
Course cards have data-testid attributes (e.g., course-card-f6aabdef-0758-499d-bc08-6f766540b774)
Courses fetched from API: Venture Creation, Guidance and Counselling, Communication Skills, etc.
Course cards show title, description, duration, and level badges
Clicking course card navigates to course detail page
Course detail page shows: title (Venture Creation), course code (ENT312), department (Entrepreneurship)
Course detail page displays: 3 Months duration, Online mode, 10 Lessons, €50 Application Fee
Course detail page has sections: Overview, About, Requirements, What you will learn, Career
Course detail page has Apply Now button linking to /apply page
Apply page shows 3-step wizard (steps 1, 2, 3 indicators)
Apply Step 1 - Personal Information: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Country dropdown, City inputs
Apply Step 2 - Program & Documents: Program selection dropdown populated with 9 courses from API

Apply Step 2 shows courses: Venture Creation, Guidance and Counselling, Communication Skills, Product Management, Data Analytics, Backend Engineering, Frontend Engineering, Music Marketing, Digital Marketing
Apply Step 2 has document upload sections for High School Certificate and ID

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 requested features verified and working

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) School app runs on localhost:3001 with Vite. 2) Courses are fetched from API at /api/courses/public - returns 9 courses. 3) Login button links to LMS at https://gitb-school.preview.emergentagent.com/login. 4) Apply page wizard works - Step 1 (Personal Info), Step 2 (Program Selection from API + Document Upload), Step 3 (Payment). 5) Course detail pages load course info from API correctly including title, code, department, duration, lessons, and €50 fee.

home_page_loads.description: GITB branding, navigation, Login/Apply buttons all present

courses_from_api.description: 5 course cards displayed in Trending Programs, fetched from /api/courses/public

program_dropdown.description: Step 2 shows 9 programs from API in dropdown

course_detail_page.description: Loads course info: title, code, department, duration, mode, lessons, fee
